=== Refactor Application Results ===

=== [R1] Refactor 0: "Wrap with pipe" ===

--- file:///.src/layerMagic_build.ts ---
// refactor: 20:14-20:49, 25:14-25:36, 32:14-32:37, 39:14-39:32, 43:14-43:27, 45:14-45:36
// @effect-v3
import { Effect, Layer } from "effect"

class DbConnection extends Effect.Service<DbConnection>()("DbConnection", {
  succeed: {}
}) {}
class FileSystem extends Effect.Service<FileSystem>()("FileSystem", {
  succeed: {}
}) {
  static bothInAndOut = Layer.effect(FileSystem, FileSystem)
}
class Cache extends Effect.Service<Cache>()("Cache", {
  effect: Effect.as(FileSystem, {})
}) {}
class UserRepository extends Effect.Service<UserRepository>()("UserRepository", {
  effect: Effect.as(Effect.zipRight(DbConnection, Cache), {})
}) {}

export const pipe(expect_Cache_provideMergeFileSystem) = [
  FileSystem.Default,
  Cache.Default
] as any as Layer.Layer<FileSystem>

export const prepareSomewhatComplex = [
  DbConnection.Default,
  Cache.Default,
  UserRepository.Default,
  FileSystem.Default
] as any as Layer.Layer<UserRepository | Cache>

export const prepareSomewhatComplex2 = [
  DbConnection.Default,
  Cache.Default,
  UserRepository.Default,
  FileSystem.Default
] as any as Layer.Layer<UserRepository | Cache | FileSystem>

export const provideRequireSame = [FileSystem.bothInAndOut, FileSystem.Default, Cache.Default] as any as Layer.Layer<
  Cache | FileSystem
>

export const tooLessOutput = [Cache.Default] as any as Layer.Layer<Cache>

export const missingImplementations = [UserRepository.Default, FileSystem.Default] as any as Layer.Layer<Cache>


=== [R1] Refactor 1: "Toggle type annotation" ===

--- file:///.src/layerMagic_build.ts ---
// refactor: 20:14-20:49, 25:14-25:36, 32:14-32:37, 39:14-39:32, 43:14-43:27, 45:14-45:36
// @effect-v3
import { Effect, Layer } from "effect"

class DbConnection extends Effect.Service<DbConnection>()("DbConnection", {
  succeed: {}
}) {}
class FileSystem extends Effect.Service<FileSystem>()("FileSystem", {
  succeed: {}
}) {
  static bothInAndOut = Layer.effect(FileSystem, FileSystem)
}
class Cache extends Effect.Service<Cache>()("Cache", {
  effect: Effect.as(FileSystem, {})
}) {}
class UserRepository extends Effect.Service<UserRepository>()("UserRepository", {
  effect: Effect.as(Effect.zipRight(DbConnection, Cache), {})
}) {}

export const expect_Cache_provideMergeFileSystem: Layer.Layer<FileSystem, never, never> = [
  FileSystem.Default,
  Cache.Default
] as any as Layer.Layer<FileSystem>

export const prepareSomewhatComplex = [
  DbConnection.Default,
  Cache.Default,
  UserRepository.Default,
  FileSystem.Default
] as any as Layer.Layer<UserRepository | Cache>

export const prepareSomewhatComplex2 = [
  DbConnection.Default,
  Cache.Default,
  UserRepository.Default,
  FileSystem.Default
] as any as Layer.Layer<UserRepository | Cache | FileSystem>

export const provideRequireSame = [FileSystem.bothInAndOut, FileSystem.Default, Cache.Default] as any as Layer.Layer<
  Cache | FileSystem
>

export const tooLessOutput = [Cache.Default] as any as Layer.Layer<Cache>

export const missingImplementations = [UserRepository.Default, FileSystem.Default] as any as Layer.Layer<Cache>


=== [R1] Refactor 2: "Toggle lazy const" ===

--- file:///.src/layerMagic_build.ts ---
// refactor: 20:14-20:49, 25:14-25:36, 32:14-32:37, 39:14-39:32, 43:14-43:27, 45:14-45:36
// @effect-v3
import { Effect, Layer } from "effect"

class DbConnection extends Effect.Service<DbConnection>()("DbConnection", {
  succeed: {}
}) {}
class FileSystem extends Effect.Service<FileSystem>()("FileSystem", {
  succeed: {}
}) {
  static bothInAndOut = Layer.effect(FileSystem, FileSystem)
}
class Cache extends Effect.Service<Cache>()("Cache", {
  effect: Effect.as(FileSystem, {})
}) {}
class UserRepository extends Effect.Service<UserRepository>()("UserRepository", {
  effect: Effect.as(Effect.zipRight(DbConnection, Cache), {})
}) {}

export const expect_Cache_provideMergeFileSystem = () => [
  FileSystem.Default,
  Cache.Default
] as any as Layer.Layer<FileSystem>

export const prepareSomewhatComplex = [
  DbConnection.Default,
  Cache.Default,
  UserRepository.Default,
  FileSystem.Default
] as any as Layer.Layer<UserRepository | Cache>

export const prepareSomewhatComplex2 = [
  DbConnection.Default,
  Cache.Default,
  UserRepository.Default,
  FileSystem.Default
] as any as Layer.Layer<UserRepository | Cache | FileSystem>

export const provideRequireSame = [FileSystem.bothInAndOut, FileSystem.Default, Cache.Default] as any as Layer.Layer<
  Cache | FileSystem
>

export const tooLessOutput = [Cache.Default] as any as Layer.Layer<Cache>

export const missingImplementations = [UserRepository.Default, FileSystem.Default] as any as Layer.Layer<Cache>


=== [R1] Refactor 3: "Compose layers automatically with target output services" ===

--- file:///.src/layerMagic_build.ts ---
// refactor: 20:14-20:49, 25:14-25:36, 32:14-32:37, 39:14-39:32, 43:14-43:27, 45:14-45:36
// @effect-v3
import { Effect, Layer } from "effect"

class DbConnection extends Effect.Service<DbConnection>()("DbConnection", {
  succeed: {}
}) {}
class FileSystem extends Effect.Service<FileSystem>()("FileSystem", {
  succeed: {}
}) {
  static bothInAndOut = Layer.effect(FileSystem, FileSystem)
}
class Cache extends Effect.Service<Cache>()("Cache", {
  effect: Effect.as(FileSystem, {})
}) {}
class UserRepository extends Effect.Service<UserRepository>()("UserRepository", {
  effect: Effect.as(Effect.zipRight(DbConnection, Cache), {})
}) {}

export const expect_Cache_provideMergeFileSystem = Cache.Default.pipe(Layer.provideMerge(FileSystem.Default));

export const prepareSomewhatComplex = [
  DbConnection.Default,
  Cache.Default,
  UserRepository.Default,
  FileSystem.Default
] as any as Layer.Layer<UserRepository | Cache>

export const prepareSomewhatComplex2 = [
  DbConnection.Default,
  Cache.Default,
  UserRepository.Default,
  FileSystem.Default
] as any as Layer.Layer<UserRepository | Cache | FileSystem>

export const provideRequireSame = [FileSystem.bothInAndOut, FileSystem.Default, Cache.Default] as any as Layer.Layer<
  Cache | FileSystem
>

export const tooLessOutput = [Cache.Default] as any as Layer.Layer<Cache>

export const missingImplementations = [UserRepository.Default, FileSystem.Default] as any as Layer.Layer<Cache>


=== [R2] Refactor 0: "Wrap with pipe" ===

--- file:///.src/layerMagic_build.ts ---
// refactor: 20:14-20:49, 25:14-25:36, 32:14-32:37, 39:14-39:32, 43:14-43:27, 45:14-45:36
// @effect-v3
import { Effect, Layer } from "effect"

class DbConnection extends Effect.Service<DbConnection>()("DbConnection", {
  succeed: {}
}) {}
class FileSystem extends Effect.Service<FileSystem>()("FileSystem", {
  succeed: {}
}) {
  static bothInAndOut = Layer.effect(FileSystem, FileSystem)
}
class Cache extends Effect.Service<Cache>()("Cache", {
  effect: Effect.as(FileSystem, {})
}) {}
class UserRepository extends Effect.Service<UserRepository>()("UserRepository", {
  effect: Effect.as(Effect.zipRight(DbConnection, Cache), {})
}) {}

export const expect_Cache_provideMergeFileSystem = [
  FileSystem.Default,
  Cache.Default
] as any as Layer.Layer<FileSystem>

export const pipe(prepareSomewhatComplex) = [
  DbConnection.Default,
  Cache.Default,
  UserRepository.Default,
  FileSystem.Default
] as any as Layer.Layer<UserRepository | Cache>

export const prepareSomewhatComplex2 = [
  DbConnection.Default,
  Cache.Default,
  UserRepository.Default,
  FileSystem.Default
] as any as Layer.Layer<UserRepository | Cache | FileSystem>

export const provideRequireSame = [FileSystem.bothInAndOut, FileSystem.Default, Cache.Default] as any as Layer.Layer<
  Cache | FileSystem
>

export const tooLessOutput = [Cache.Default] as any as Layer.Layer<Cache>

export const missingImplementations = [UserRepository.Default, FileSystem.Default] as any as Layer.Layer<Cache>


=== [R2] Refactor 1: "Toggle type annotation" ===

--- file:///.src/layerMagic_build.ts ---
// refactor: 20:14-20:49, 25:14-25:36, 32:14-32:37, 39:14-39:32, 43:14-43:27, 45:14-45:36
// @effect-v3
import { Effect, Layer } from "effect"

class DbConnection extends Effect.Service<DbConnection>()("DbConnection", {
  succeed: {}
}) {}
class FileSystem extends Effect.Service<FileSystem>()("FileSystem", {
  succeed: {}
}) {
  static bothInAndOut = Layer.effect(FileSystem, FileSystem)
}
class Cache extends Effect.Service<Cache>()("Cache", {
  effect: Effect.as(FileSystem, {})
}) {}
class UserRepository extends Effect.Service<UserRepository>()("UserRepository", {
  effect: Effect.as(Effect.zipRight(DbConnection, Cache), {})
}) {}

export const expect_Cache_provideMergeFileSystem = [
  FileSystem.Default,
  Cache.Default
] as any as Layer.Layer<FileSystem>

export const prepareSomewhatComplex: Layer.Layer<Cache | UserRepository, never, never> = [
  DbConnection.Default,
  Cache.Default,
  UserRepository.Default,
  FileSystem.Default
] as any as Layer.Layer<UserRepository | Cache>

export const prepareSomewhatComplex2 = [
  DbConnection.Default,
  Cache.Default,
  UserRepository.Default,
  FileSystem.Default
] as any as Layer.Layer<UserRepository | Cache | FileSystem>

export const provideRequireSame = [FileSystem.bothInAndOut, FileSystem.Default, Cache.Default] as any as Layer.Layer<
  Cache | FileSystem
>

export const tooLessOutput = [Cache.Default] as any as Layer.Layer<Cache>

export const missingImplementations = [UserRepository.Default, FileSystem.Default] as any as Layer.Layer<Cache>


=== [R2] Refactor 2: "Toggle lazy const" ===

--- file:///.src/layerMagic_build.ts ---
// refactor: 20:14-20:49, 25:14-25:36, 32:14-32:37, 39:14-39:32, 43:14-43:27, 45:14-45:36
// @effect-v3
import { Effect, Layer } from "effect"

class DbConnection extends Effect.Service<DbConnection>()("DbConnection", {
  succeed: {}
}) {}
class FileSystem extends Effect.Service<FileSystem>()("FileSystem", {
  succeed: {}
}) {
  static bothInAndOut = Layer.effect(FileSystem, FileSystem)
}
class Cache extends Effect.Service<Cache>()("Cache", {
  effect: Effect.as(FileSystem, {})
}) {}
class UserRepository extends Effect.Service<UserRepository>()("UserRepository", {
  effect: Effect.as(Effect.zipRight(DbConnection, Cache), {})
}) {}

export const expect_Cache_provideMergeFileSystem = [
  FileSystem.Default,
  Cache.Default
] as any as Layer.Layer<FileSystem>

export const prepareSomewhatComplex = () => [
  DbConnection.Default,
  Cache.Default,
  UserRepository.Default,
  FileSystem.Default
] as any as Layer.Layer<UserRepository | Cache>

export const prepareSomewhatComplex2 = [
  DbConnection.Default,
  Cache.Default,
  UserRepository.Default,
  FileSystem.Default
] as any as Layer.Layer<UserRepository | Cache | FileSystem>

export const provideRequireSame = [FileSystem.bothInAndOut, FileSystem.Default, Cache.Default] as any as Layer.Layer<
  Cache | FileSystem
>

export const tooLessOutput = [Cache.Default] as any as Layer.Layer<Cache>

export const missingImplementations = [UserRepository.Default, FileSystem.Default] as any as Layer.Layer<Cache>


=== [R2] Refactor 3: "Compose layers automatically with target output services" ===

--- file:///.src/layerMagic_build.ts ---
// refactor: 20:14-20:49, 25:14-25:36, 32:14-32:37, 39:14-39:32, 43:14-43:27, 45:14-45:36
// @effect-v3
import { Effect, Layer } from "effect"

class DbConnection extends Effect.Service<DbConnection>()("DbConnection", {
  succeed: {}
}) {}
class FileSystem extends Effect.Service<FileSystem>()("FileSystem", {
  succeed: {}
}) {
  static bothInAndOut = Layer.effect(FileSystem, FileSystem)
}
class Cache extends Effect.Service<Cache>()("Cache", {
  effect: Effect.as(FileSystem, {})
}) {}
class UserRepository extends Effect.Service<UserRepository>()("UserRepository", {
  effect: Effect.as(Effect.zipRight(DbConnection, Cache), {})
}) {}

export const expect_Cache_provideMergeFileSystem = [
  FileSystem.Default,
  Cache.Default
] as any as Layer.Layer<FileSystem>

export const prepareSomewhatComplex = UserRepository.Default.pipe(Layer.provideMerge(Cache.Default), Layer.provide(FileSystem.Default), Layer.provide(DbConnection.Default));

export const prepareSomewhatComplex2 = [
  DbConnection.Default,
  Cache.Default,
  UserRepository.Default,
  FileSystem.Default
] as any as Layer.Layer<UserRepository | Cache | FileSystem>

export const provideRequireSame = [FileSystem.bothInAndOut, FileSystem.Default, Cache.Default] as any as Layer.Layer<
  Cache | FileSystem
>

export const tooLessOutput = [Cache.Default] as any as Layer.Layer<Cache>

export const missingImplementations = [UserRepository.Default, FileSystem.Default] as any as Layer.Layer<Cache>


=== [R3] Refactor 0: "Wrap with pipe" ===

--- file:///.src/layerMagic_build.ts ---
// refactor: 20:14-20:49, 25:14-25:36, 32:14-32:37, 39:14-39:32, 43:14-43:27, 45:14-45:36
// @effect-v3
import { Effect, Layer } from "effect"

class DbConnection extends Effect.Service<DbConnection>()("DbConnection", {
  succeed: {}
}) {}
class FileSystem extends Effect.Service<FileSystem>()("FileSystem", {
  succeed: {}
}) {
  static bothInAndOut = Layer.effect(FileSystem, FileSystem)
}
class Cache extends Effect.Service<Cache>()("Cache", {
  effect: Effect.as(FileSystem, {})
}) {}
class UserRepository extends Effect.Service<UserRepository>()("UserRepository", {
  effect: Effect.as(Effect.zipRight(DbConnection, Cache), {})
}) {}

export const expect_Cache_provideMergeFileSystem = [
  FileSystem.Default,
  Cache.Default
] as any as Layer.Layer<FileSystem>

export const prepareSomewhatComplex = [
  DbConnection.Default,
  Cache.Default,
  UserRepository.Default,
  FileSystem.Default
] as any as Layer.Layer<UserRepository | Cache>

export const pipe(prepareSomewhatComplex2) = [
  DbConnection.Default,
  Cache.Default,
  UserRepository.Default,
  FileSystem.Default
] as any as Layer.Layer<UserRepository | Cache | FileSystem>

export const provideRequireSame = [FileSystem.bothInAndOut, FileSystem.Default, Cache.Default] as any as Layer.Layer<
  Cache | FileSystem
>

export const tooLessOutput = [Cache.Default] as any as Layer.Layer<Cache>

export const missingImplementations = [UserRepository.Default, FileSystem.Default] as any as Layer.Layer<Cache>

// refactor: 20:14-20:49, 25:14-25:36, 32:14-32:37, 39:14-39:32, 43:14-43:27, 45:14-45:36
// @effect-v3
import { Effect, Layer } from "effect"

class DbConnection extends Effect.Service<DbConnection>()("DbConnection", {
  succeed: {}
}) {}
class FileSystem extends Effect.Service<FileSystem>()("FileSystem", {
  succeed: {}
}) {
  static bothInAndOut = Layer.effect(FileSystem, FileSystem)
}
class Cache extends Effect.Service<Cache>()("Cache", {
  effect: Effect.as(FileSystem, {})
}) {}
class UserRepository extends Effect.Service<UserRepository>()("UserRepository", {
  effect: Effect.as(Effect.zipRight(DbConnection, Cache), {})
}) {}

export const expect_Cache_provideMergeFileSystem = [
  FileSystem.Default,
  Cache.Default
] as any as Layer.Layer<FileSystem>

export const prepareSomewhatComplex = [
  DbConnection.Default,
  Cache.Default,
  UserRepository.Default,
  FileSystem.Default
] as any as Layer.Layer<UserRepository | Cache>

export const prepareSomewhatComplex2: Layer.Layer<Cache | FileSystem | UserRepository, never, never> = [
  DbConnection.Default,
  Cache.Default,
  UserRepository.Default,
  FileSystem.Default
] as any as Layer.Layer<UserRepository | Cache | FileSystem>

export const provideRequireSame = [FileSystem.bothInAndOut, FileSystem.Default, Cache.Default] as any as Layer.Layer<
  Cache | FileSystem
>

export const tooLessOutput = [Cache.Default] as any as Layer.Layer<Cache>

export const missingImplementations = [UserRepository.Default, FileSystem.Default] as any as Layer.Layer<Cache>

--- file:///.src/layerMagic_build.ts ---
// refactor: 20:14-20:49, 25:14-25:36, 32:14-32:37, 39:14-39:32, 43:14-43:27, 45:14-45:36
// @effect-v3
import { Effect, Layer } from "effect"

class DbConnection extends Effect.Service<DbConnection>()("DbConnection", {
  succeed: {}
}) {}
class FileSystem extends Effect.Service<FileSystem>()("FileSystem", {
  succeed: {}
}) {
  static bothInAndOut = Layer.effect(FileSystem, FileSystem)
}
class Cache extends Effect.Service<Cache>()("Cache", {
  effect: Effect.as(FileSystem, {})
}) {}
class UserRepository extends Effect.Service<UserRepository>()("UserRepository", {
  effect: Effect.as(Effect.zipRight(DbConnection, Cache), {})
}) {}

export const expect_Cache_provideMergeFileSystem = [
  FileSystem.Default,
  Cache.Default
] as any as Layer.Layer<FileSystem>

export const prepareSomewhatComplex = [
  DbConnection.Default,
  Cache.Default,
  UserRepository.Default,
  FileSystem.Default
] as any as Layer.Layer<UserRepository | Cache>

export const prepareSomewhatComplex2 = () => [
  DbConnection.Default,
  Cache.Default,
  UserRepository.Default,
  FileSystem.Default
] as any as Layer.Layer<UserRepository | Cache | FileSystem>

export const provideRequireSame = [FileSystem.bothInAndOut, FileSystem.Default, Cache.Default] as any as Layer.Layer<
  Cache | FileSystem
>

export const tooLessOutput = [Cache.Default] as any as Layer.Layer<Cache>

export const missingImplementations = [UserRepository.Default, FileSystem.Default] as any as Layer.Layer<Cache>


=== [R3] Refactor 3: "Compose layers automatically with target output services" ===

--- file:///.src/layerMagic_build.ts ---
// refactor: 20:14-20:49, 25:14-25:36, 32:14-32:37, 39:14-39:32, 43:14-43:27, 45:14-45:36
// @effect-v3
import { Effect, Layer } from "effect"

class DbConnection extends Effect.Service<DbConnection>()("DbConnection", {
  succeed: {}
}) {}
class FileSystem extends Effect.Service<FileSystem>()("FileSystem", {
  succeed: {}
}) {
  static bothInAndOut = Layer.effect(FileSystem, FileSystem)
}
class Cache extends Effect.Service<Cache>()("Cache", {
  effect: Effect.as(FileSystem, {})
}) {}
class UserRepository extends Effect.Service<UserRepository>()("UserRepository", {
  effect: Effect.as(Effect.zipRight(DbConnection, Cache), {})
}) {}

export const expect_Cache_provideMergeFileSystem = [
  FileSystem.Default,
  Cache.Default
] as any as Layer.Layer<FileSystem>

export const prepareSomewhatComplex = [
  DbConnection.Default,
  Cache.Default,
  UserRepository.Default,
  FileSystem.Default
] as any as Layer.Layer<UserRepository | Cache>

export const prepareSomewhatComplex2 = UserRepository.Default.pipe(Layer.provideMerge(Cache.Default), Layer.provideMerge(FileSystem.Default), Layer.provide(DbConnection.Default));

export const provideRequireSame = [FileSystem.bothInAndOut, FileSystem.Default, Cache.Default] as any as Layer.Layer<
  Cache | FileSystem
>

export const tooLessOutput = [Cache.Default] as any as Layer.Layer<Cache>

export const missingImplementations = [UserRepository.Default, FileSystem.Default] as any as Layer.Layer<Cache>


=== [R4] Refactor 0: "Wrap with pipe" ===

--- file:///.src/layerMagic_build.ts ---
// refactor: 20:14-20:49, 25:14-25:36, 32:14-32:37, 39:14-39:32, 43:14-43:27, 45:14-45:36
// @effect-v3
import { Effect, Layer } from "effect"

class DbConnection extends Effect.Service<DbConnection>()("DbConnection", {
  succeed: {}
}) {}
class FileSystem extends Effect.Service<FileSystem>()("FileSystem", {
  succeed: {}
}) {
  static bothInAndOut = Layer.effect(FileSystem, FileSystem)
}
class Cache extends Effect.Service<Cache>()("Cache", {
  effect: Effect.as(FileSystem, {})
}) {}
class UserRepository extends Effect.Service<UserRepository>()("UserRepository", {
  effect: Effect.as(Effect.zipRight(DbConnection, Cache), {})
}) {}

export const expect_Cache_provideMergeFileSystem = [
  FileSystem.Default,
  Cache.Default
] as any as Layer.Layer<FileSystem>

export const prepareSomewhatComplex = [
  DbConnection.Default,
  Cache.Default,
  UserRepository.Default,
  FileSystem.Default
] as any as Layer.Layer<UserRepository | Cache>

export const prepareSomewhatComplex2 = [
  DbConnection.Default,
  Cache.Default,
  UserRepository.Default,
  FileSystem.Default
] as any as Layer.Layer<UserRepository | Cache | FileSystem>

export const pipe(provideRequireSame) = [FileSystem.bothInAndOut, FileSystem.Default, Cache.Default] as any as Layer.Layer<
  Cache | FileSystem
>

export const tooLessOutput = [Cache.Default] as any as Layer.Layer<Cache>

export const missingImplementations = [UserRepository.Default, FileSystem.Default] as any as Layer.Layer<Cache>


=== [R4] Refactor 1: "Toggle type annotation" ===

--- file:///.src/layerMagic_build.ts ---
// refactor: 20:14-20:49, 25:14-25:36, 32:14-32:37, 39:14-39:32, 43:14-43:27, 45:14-45:36
// @effect-v3
import { Effect, Layer } from "effect"

class DbConnection extends Effect.Service<DbConnection>()("DbConnection", {
  succeed: {}
}) {}
class FileSystem extends Effect.Service<FileSystem>()("FileSystem", {
  succeed: {}
}) {
  static bothInAndOut = Layer.effect(FileSystem, FileSystem)
}
class Cache extends Effect.Service<Cache>()("Cache", {
  effect: Effect.as(FileSystem, {})
}) {}
class UserRepository extends Effect.Service<UserRepository>()("UserRepository", {
  effect: Effect.as(Effect.zipRight(DbConnection, Cache), {})
}) {}

export const expect_Cache_provideMergeFileSystem = [
  FileSystem.Default,
  Cache.Default
] as any as Layer.Layer<FileSystem>

export const prepareSomewhatComplex = [
  DbConnection.Default,
  Cache.Default,
  UserRepository.Default,
  FileSystem.Default
] as any as Layer.Layer<UserRepository | Cache>

export const prepareSomewhatComplex2 = [
  DbConnection.Default,
  Cache.Default,
  UserRepository.Default,
  FileSystem.Default
] as any as Layer.Layer<UserRepository | Cache | FileSystem>

export const provideRequireSame: Layer.Layer<Cache | FileSystem, never, never> = [FileSystem.bothInAndOut, FileSystem.Default, Cache.Default] as any as Layer.Layer<
  Cache | FileSystem
>

export const tooLessOutput = [Cache.Default] as any as Layer.Layer<Cache>

export const missingImplementations = [UserRepository.Default, FileSystem.Default] as any as Layer.Layer<Cache>


=== [R4] Refactor 2: "Toggle lazy const" ===

--- file:///.src/layerMagic_build.ts ---
// refactor: 20:14-20:49, 25:14-25:36, 32:14-32:37, 39:14-39:32, 43:14-43:27, 45:14-45:36
// @effect-v3
import { Effect, Layer } from "effect"

class DbConnection extends Effect.Service<DbConnection>()("DbConnection", {
  succeed: {}
}) {}
class FileSystem extends Effect.Service<FileSystem>()("FileSystem", {
  succeed: {}
}) {
  static bothInAndOut = Layer.effect(FileSystem, FileSystem)
}
class Cache extends Effect.Service<Cache>()("Cache", {
  effect: Effect.as(FileSystem, {})
}) {}
class UserRepository extends Effect.Service<UserRepository>()("UserRepository", {
  effect: Effect.as(Effect.zipRight(DbConnection, Cache), {})
}) {}

export const expect_Cache_provideMergeFileSystem = [
  FileSystem.Default,
  Cache.Default
] as any as Layer.Layer<FileSystem>

export const prepareSomewhatComplex = [
  DbConnection.Default,
  Cache.Default,
  UserRepository.Default,
  FileSystem.Default
] as any as Layer.Layer<UserRepository | Cache>

export const prepareSomewhatComplex2 = [
  DbConnection.Default,
  Cache.Default,
  UserRepository.Default,
  FileSystem.Default
] as any as Layer.Layer<UserRepository | Cache | FileSystem>

export const provideRequireSame = () => [FileSystem.bothInAndOut, FileSystem.Default, Cache.Default] as any as Layer.Layer<
  Cache | FileSystem
>

export const tooLessOutput = [Cache.Default] as any as Layer.Layer<Cache>

export const missingImplementations = [UserRepository.Default, FileSystem.Default] as any as Layer.Layer<Cache>


=== [R4] Refactor 3: "Compose layers automatically with target output services" ===

--- file:///.src/layerMagic_build.ts ---
// refactor: 20:14-20:49, 25:14-25:36, 32:14-32:37, 39:14-39:32, 43:14-43:27, 45:14-45:36
// @effect-v3
import { Effect, Layer } from "effect"

class DbConnection extends Effect.Service<DbConnection>()("DbConnection", {
  succeed: {}
}) {}
class FileSystem extends Effect.Service<FileSystem>()("FileSystem", {
  succeed: {}
}) {
  static bothInAndOut = Layer.effect(FileSystem, FileSystem)
}
class Cache extends Effect.Service<Cache>()("Cache", {
  effect: Effect.as(FileSystem, {})
}) {}
class UserRepository extends Effect.Service<UserRepository>()("UserRepository", {
  effect: Effect.as(Effect.zipRight(DbConnection, Cache), {})
}) {}

export const expect_Cache_provideMergeFileSystem = [
  FileSystem.Default,
  Cache.Default
] as any as Layer.Layer<FileSystem>

export const prepareSomewhatComplex = [
  DbConnection.Default,
  Cache.Default,
  UserRepository.Default,
  FileSystem.Default
] as any as Layer.Layer<UserRepository | Cache>

export const prepareSomewhatComplex2 = [
  DbConnection.Default,
  Cache.Default,
  UserRepository.Default,
  FileSystem.Default
] as any as Layer.Layer<UserRepository | Cache | FileSystem>

export const provideRequireSame = Cache.Default.pipe(Layer.provide(FileSystem.bothInAndOut), Layer.provideMerge(FileSystem.Default));

export const tooLessOutput = [Cache.Default] as any as Layer.Layer<Cache>

export const missingImplementations = [UserRepository.Default, FileSystem.Default] as any as Layer.Layer<Cache>


=== [R5] Refactor 0: "Wrap with pipe" ===

--- file:///.src/layerMagic_build.ts ---
// refactor: 20:14-20:49, 25:14-25:36, 32:14-32:37, 39:14-39:32, 43:14-43:27, 45:14-45:36
// @effect-v3
import { Effect, Layer } from "effect"

class DbConnection extends Effect.Service<DbConnection>()("DbConnection", {
  succeed: {}
}) {}
class FileSystem extends Effect.Service<FileSystem>()("FileSystem", {
  succeed: {}
}) {
  static bothInAndOut = Layer.effect(FileSystem, FileSystem)
}
class Cache extends Effect.Service<Cache>()("Cache", {
  effect: Effect.as(FileSystem, {})
}) {}
class UserRepository extends Effect.Service<UserRepository>()("UserRepository", {
  effect: Effect.as(Effect.zipRight(DbConnection, Cache), {})
}) {}

export const expect_Cache_provideMergeFileSystem = [
  FileSystem.Default,
  Cache.Default
] as any as Layer.Layer<FileSystem>

export const prepareSomewhatComplex = [
  DbConnection.Default,
  Cache.Default,
  UserRepository.Default,
  FileSystem.Default
] as any as Layer.Layer<UserRepository | Cache>

export const prepareSomewhatComplex2 = [
  DbConnection.Default,
  Cache.Default,
  UserRepository.Default,
  FileSystem.Default
] as any as Layer.Layer<UserRepository | Cache | FileSystem>

export const provideRequireSame = [FileSystem.bothInAndOut, FileSystem.Default, Cache.Default] as any as Layer.Layer<
  Cache | FileSystem
>

export const pipe(tooLessOutput) = [Cache.Default] as any as Layer.Layer<Cache>

export const missingImplementations = [UserRepository.Default, FileSystem.Default] as any as Layer.Layer<Cache>


=== [R5] Refactor 1: "Toggle type annotation" ===

--- file:///.src/layerMagic_build.ts ---
// refactor: 20:14-20:49, 25:14-25:36, 32:14-32:37, 39:14-39:32, 43:14-43:27, 45:14-45:36
// @effect-v3
import { Effect, Layer } from "effect"

class DbConnection extends Effect.Service<DbConnection>()("DbConnection", {
  succeed: {}
}) {}
class FileSystem extends Effect.Service<FileSystem>()("FileSystem", {
  succeed: {}
}) {
  static bothInAndOut = Layer.effect(FileSystem, FileSystem)
}
class Cache extends Effect.Service<Cache>()("Cache", {
  effect: Effect.as(FileSystem, {})
}) {}
class UserRepository extends Effect.Service<UserRepository>()("UserRepository", {
  effect: Effect.as(Effect.zipRight(DbConnection, Cache), {})
}) {}

export const expect_Cache_provideMergeFileSystem = [
  FileSystem.Default,
  Cache.Default
] as any as Layer.Layer<FileSystem>

export const prepareSomewhatComplex = [
  DbConnection.Default,
  Cache.Default,
  UserRepository.Default,
  FileSystem.Default
] as any as Layer.Layer<UserRepository | Cache>

export const prepareSomewhatComplex2 = [
  DbConnection.Default,
  Cache.Default,
  UserRepository.Default,
  FileSystem.Default
] as any as Layer.Layer<UserRepository | Cache | FileSystem>

export const provideRequireSame = [FileSystem.bothInAndOut, FileSystem.Default, Cache.Default] as any as Layer.Layer<
  Cache | FileSystem
>

export const tooLessOutput: Layer.Layer<Cache, never, never> = [Cache.Default] as any as Layer.Layer<Cache>

export const missingImplementations = [UserRepository.Default, FileSystem.Default] as any as Layer.Layer<Cache>


=== [R5] Refactor 2: "Toggle lazy const" ===

// refactor: 20:14-20:49, 25:14-25:36, 32:14-32:37, 39:14-39:32, 43:14-43:27, 45:14-45:36
// @effect-v3
import { Effect, Layer } from "effect"

class DbConnection extends Effect.Service<DbConnection>()("DbConnection", {
  succeed: {}
}) {}
class FileSystem extends Effect.Service<FileSystem>()("FileSystem", {
  succeed: {}
}) {
  static bothInAndOut = Layer.effect(FileSystem, FileSystem)
}
class Cache extends Effect.Service<Cache>()("Cache", {
  effect: Effect.as(FileSystem, {})
}) {}
class UserRepository extends Effect.Service<UserRepository>()("UserRepository", {
  effect: Effect.as(Effect.zipRight(DbConnection, Cache), {})
}) {}

export const expect_Cache_provideMergeFileSystem = [
  FileSystem.Default,
  Cache.Default
] as any as Layer.Layer<FileSystem>

export const prepareSomewhatComplex = [
  DbConnection.Default,
  Cache.Default,
  UserRepository.Default,
  FileSystem.Default
] as any as Layer.Layer<UserRepository | Cache>

export const prepareSomewhatComplex2 = [
  DbConnection.Default,
  Cache.Default,
  UserRepository.Default,
  FileSystem.Default
] as any as Layer.Layer<UserRepository | Cache | FileSystem>

export const provideRequireSame = [FileSystem.bothInAndOut, FileSystem.Default, Cache.Default] as any as Layer.Layer<
  Cache | FileSystem
>

export const tooLessOutput = () => [Cache.Default] as any as Layer.Layer<Cache>

export const missingImplementations = [UserRepository.Default, FileSystem.Default] as any as Layer.Layer<Cache>


=== [R6] Refactor 0: "Wrap with pipe" ===

// refactor: 20:14-20:49, 25:14-25:36, 32:14-32:37, 39:14-39:32, 43:14-43:27, 45:14-45:36
// @effect-v3
import { Effect, Layer } from "effect"

class DbConnection extends Effect.Service<DbConnection>()("DbConnection", {
  succeed: {}
}) {}
class FileSystem extends Effect.Service<FileSystem>()("FileSystem", {
  succeed: {}
}) {
  static bothInAndOut = Layer.effect(FileSystem, FileSystem)
}
class Cache extends Effect.Service<Cache>()("Cache", {
  effect: Effect.as(FileSystem, {})
}) {}
class UserRepository extends Effect.Service<UserRepository>()("UserRepository", {
  effect: Effect.as(Effect.zipRight(DbConnection, Cache), {})
}) {}

export const expect_Cache_provideMergeFileSystem = [
  FileSystem.Default,
  Cache.Default
] as any as Layer.Layer<FileSystem>

export const prepareSomewhatComplex = [
  DbConnection.Default,
  Cache.Default,
  UserRepository.Default,
  FileSystem.Default
] as any as Layer.Layer<UserRepository | Cache>

export const prepareSomewhatComplex2 = [
  DbConnection.Default,
  Cache.Default,
  UserRepository.Default,
  FileSystem.Default
] as any as Layer.Layer<UserRepository | Cache | FileSystem>

export const provideRequireSame = [FileSystem.bothInAndOut, FileSystem.Default, Cache.Default] as any as Layer.Layer<
  Cache | FileSystem
>

export const tooLessOutput = [Cache.Default] as any as Layer.Layer<Cache>

export const pipe(missingImplementations) = [UserRepository.Default, FileSystem.Default] as any as Layer.Layer<Cache>


=== [R6] Refactor 1: "Toggle type annotation" ===

--- file:///.src/layerMagic_build.ts ---
// refactor: 20:14-20:49, 25:14-25:36, 32:14-32:37, 39:14-39:32, 43:14-43:27, 45:14-45:36
// @effect-v3
import { Effect, Layer } from "effect"

class DbConnection extends Effect.Service<DbConnection>()("DbConnection", {
  succeed: {}
}) {}
class FileSystem extends Effect.Service<FileSystem>()("FileSystem", {
  succeed: {}
}) {
  static bothInAndOut = Layer.effect(FileSystem, FileSystem)
}
class Cache extends Effect.Service<Cache>()("Cache", {
  effect: Effect.as(FileSystem, {})
}) {}
class UserRepository extends Effect.Service<UserRepository>()("UserRepository", {
  effect: Effect.as(Effect.zipRight(DbConnection, Cache), {})
}) {}

export const expect_Cache_provideMergeFileSystem = [
  FileSystem.Default,
  Cache.Default
] as any as Layer.Layer<FileSystem>

export const prepareSomewhatComplex = [
  DbConnection.Default,
  Cache.Default,
  UserRepository.Default,
  FileSystem.Default
] as any as Layer.Layer<UserRepository | Cache>

export const prepareSomewhatComplex2 = [
  DbConnection.Default,
  Cache.Default,
  UserRepository.Default,
  FileSystem.Default
] as any as Layer.Layer<UserRepository | Cache | FileSystem>

export const provideRequireSame = [FileSystem.bothInAndOut, FileSystem.Default, Cache.Default] as any as Layer.Layer<
  Cache | FileSystem
>

export const tooLessOutput = [Cache.Default] as any as Layer.Layer<Cache>

export const missingImplementations: Layer.Layer<Cache, never, never> = [UserRepository.Default, FileSystem.Default] as any as Layer.Layer<Cache>


=== [R6] Refactor 2: "Toggle lazy const" ===

--- file:///.src/layerMagic_build.ts ---
// refactor: 20:14-20:49, 25:14-25:36, 32:14-32:37, 39:14-39:32, 43:14-43:27, 45:14-45:36
// @effect-v3
import { Effect, Layer } from "effect"

class DbConnection extends Effect.Service<DbConnection>()("DbConnection", {
  succeed: {}
}) {}
class FileSystem extends Effect.Service<FileSystem>()("FileSystem", {
  succeed: {}
}) {
  static bothInAndOut = Layer.effect(FileSystem, FileSystem)
}
class Cache extends Effect.Service<Cache>()("Cache", {
  effect: Effect.as(FileSystem, {})
}) {}
class UserRepository extends Effect.Service<UserRepository>()("UserRepository", {
  effect: Effect.as(Effect.zipRight(DbConnection, Cache), {})
}) {}

export const expect_Cache_provideMergeFileSystem = [
  FileSystem.Default,
  Cache.Default
] as any as Layer.Layer<FileSystem>

export const prepareSomewhatComplex = [
  DbConnection.Default,
  Cache.Default,
  UserRepository.Default,
  FileSystem.Default
] as any as Layer.Layer<UserRepository | Cache>

export const prepareSomewhatComplex2 = [
  DbConnection.Default,
  Cache.Default,
  UserRepository.Default,
  FileSystem.Default
] as any as Layer.Layer<UserRepository | Cache | FileSystem>

export const provideRequireSame = [FileSystem.bothInAndOut, FileSystem.Default, Cache.Default] as any as Layer.Layer<
  Cache | FileSystem
>

export const tooLessOutput = [Cache.Default] as any as Layer.Layer<Cache>

export const missingImplementations = () => [UserRepository.Default, FileSystem.Default] as any as Layer.Layer<Cache>


=== [R6] Refactor 3: "Compose layers automatically with target output services" ===

--- file:///.src/layerMagic_build.ts ---
// refactor: 20:14-20:49, 25:14-25:36, 32:14-32:37, 39:14-39:32, 43:14-43:27, 45:14-45:36
// @effect-v3
import { Effect, Layer } from "effect"

class DbConnection extends Effect.Service<DbConnection>()("DbConnection", {
  succeed: {}
}) {}
class FileSystem extends Effect.Service<FileSystem>()("FileSystem", {
  succeed: {}
}) {
  static bothInAndOut = Layer.effect(FileSystem, FileSystem)
}
class Cache extends Effect.Service<Cache>()("Cache", {
  effect: Effect.as(FileSystem, {})
}) {}
class UserRepository extends Effect.Service<UserRepository>()("UserRepository", {
  effect: Effect.as(Effect.zipRight(DbConnection, Cache), {})
}) {}

export const expect_Cache_provideMergeFileSystem = [
  FileSystem.Default,
  Cache.Default
] as any as Layer.Layer<FileSystem>

export const prepareSomewhatComplex = [
  DbConnection.Default,
  Cache.Default,
  UserRepository.Default,
  FileSystem.Default
] as any as Layer.Layer<UserRepository | Cache>

export const prepareSomewhatComplex2 = [
  DbConnection.Default,
  Cache.Default,
  UserRepository.Default,
  FileSystem.Default
] as any as Layer.Layer<UserRepository | Cache | FileSystem>

export const provideRequireSame = [FileSystem.bothInAndOut, FileSystem.Default, Cache.Default] as any as Layer.Layer<
  Cache | FileSystem
>

export const tooLessOutput = [Cache.Default] as any as Layer.Layer<Cache>

export const missingImplementations = UserRepository.Default.pipe(Layer.provide(FileSystem.Default)) /* Unable to find Cache in the provided layers. */;
